rows.notes: Adopted `gemini-flash`'s amounts and normalization logic. Visually, the values are '5 11 19'. `gemini-flash` correctly identified the pence rule violation (19d) and converted it to 1s 7d, adding 1s to the shillings column (11+1=12). `gpt-5-mini` misread the pence as '9'. Adopted `gpt-5-mini`'s more descriptive 'Total (line across)' for the description, as it reflects the visual presentation of a line and numbers without an explicit 'TOTAL' text.
